# AutoLeadss

> Done-for-you lead generation and sales automation for businesses in the UAE and Egypt — landing pages, ads, social media, and AI chatbots working together as a 24/7 sales machine.

AutoLeadss builds full marketing funnels (not just ads) for e-commerce and real estate businesses in the GCC. Pricing starts at AED 3,500/month. Bilingual (Arabic + English) team. Clients own all ad accounts and creative assets.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](/en): Overview of services, pricing, process, and FAQs.
- [Home (Arabic)](/ar): النسخة العربية — نظرة عامة على الخدمات والأسعار والأسئلة الشائعة.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable routes.
